_comment: Trial email sequence customer list. Add customers here when they sign up. sentEmails tracks which day emails have been sent to avoid duplicates.

_schema.firstName: string — used for personalization, defaults to 'there'
_schema.trialStartDate: ISO date string (required) — when their trial began
_schema.upgradePrice: number — monthly price in USD for their plan
_schema.sentEmails: array<number> — which day emails have been sent (1, 3, 7, 10, 14)

descriptions.1: Welcome — agent is ready, setup guide
descriptions.7: Check-in — how's it going, use case examples
descriptions.10: Urgency — 4 days left, what they'll lose
descriptions.14: Final push — trial ends today, last chance
